loading.line2: Something sparkly made just for you.

title.heading: The Chella Quest
title.subheading: A birthday adventure made for Ella
title.tagline: Collect the magic. Unlock the surprise.

hub.heading: Choose Your Next Magic
hub.subheading: Complete each stage to unlock a Memory Gem

levels.name: Catch the Stars
levels.blurb: Tap the floating treats as they drift up.

levels.name: Wish Boxes
levels.blurb: Open every box. Sweet messages inside.

levels.name: Memory Match
levels.blurb: Flip the cards. Find the pairs.

levels.name: Constellation Wish
levels.blurb: Connect the stars to draw a wish.

levels.name: Bake Her a Cake
levels.blurb: Design it. Tap to blow out the candles.

hub.finaleLocked: Finish all five stages to open the last letter
hub.finaleUnlocked: You did it! Open the final letter

catch.title: Level 1 — Catch the Stars
catch.instruction: Tap the floating sparkles as they drift up. Catch 15 before the timer ends!
catch.failMessage: So close! Try again — the magic is patient.

gem.title: Memory Gem #1 — Sparkle
gem.text: On every ordinary day, you make the air around you feel a little bit enchanted.

boxes.title: Level 2 — Wish Boxes
boxes.instruction: Tap each gift box to open it. Collect all 6 wishes.

wishes.title: A Wish for Laughter
wishes.text: May today be full of that laugh of yours that makes everyone nearby smile.

wishes.title: A Wish for Adventure
wishes.text: May this year be a soft-launch era: new cities, new favourite cafes, new inside jokes.

wishes.title: A Wish for Treats
wishes.text: May every coffee be perfectly made and every dessert bigger than expected.

wishes.title: A Wish for Being Spoiled
wishes.text: You deserve to be the main character today. And also tomorrow. And also every Tuesday.

wishes.title: A Wish for Softness
wishes.text: A year of cosy mornings, warm evenings, and people who love you loudly.

wishes.title: A Wish for More of This
wishes.text: Whatever makes you feel the most like YOU — may this year be full of exactly that.

boxes.successMessage: Every wish opened. Every wish true.

gem.title: Memory Gem #2 — Wishes
gem.text: Six little wishes, one for every letter of your name: E-L-L-A-X-O.

memory.title: Level 3 — Memory Match
memory.instruction: Flip the cards to find the matching pairs.

gem.title: Memory Gem #3 — Kindred
gem.text: Some things just fit. The right shoes. A favourite song. Us, across any distance.

constellation.title: Level 4 — Constellation Wish
constellation.instruction: Tap the stars in order to draw the hidden wish in the sky.

gem.title: Memory Gem #4 — Sky
gem.text: Different time zones, same sky. I hope you look up tonight and feel it.

cake.title: Level 5 — Bake Her a Cake
cake.instruction: Pick a flavour, add icing, scatter toppings. Then tap the candles to blow them out.
cake.successMessage: You made a wish. I hope it was a greedy one.

gem.title: Memory Gem #5 — Wish
gem.text: Whatever you wished for — I'm already rooting for it louder than anyone else.

finale.heading: Happy Birthday, Ella
body: You made it to the end of the quest — but honestly, you've been the main character the whole way through.
Distance is just geography. The way I feel about you isn't. Today the whole internet gets a tiny pink window into how special you are to me — and it's still not big enough.
I hope this year is the softest, silliest, most spoiled one yet.
